headline: Reddit’s Profit Shift Highlights Growing AI And Data Licensing Role
summary: Reddit (NYSE:RDDT) has shifted to consistent profitability following its IPO. Management links this shift to AI-driven ad tools, data licensing, and integrations with leading AI platforms. The company is also expanding overseas and broadening partnerships with services such as Google Gemini and ChatGPT. For investors watching NYSE:RDDT, the move to steady profits marks a clear change from its earlier image as a meme-driven trade. The share price sits at $147.11, with a 3.3% gain over the...

headline: Google Data Center in Minnesota Would Be Powered by Wind, Energy Storage

headline: New study finds AI models prefer Bitcoin and digital money over traditional fiat currency
summary: The Bitcoin Policy Institute (BPI), a nonpartisan research organization, released new research today examining how frontier AI models would choose to transact if they were operating as autonomous economic agents. The study tested 36 models from six leading AI providers—Anthropic, DeepSeek, Google, MiniMax, OpenAI, and xAI—across 9,072 open-ended monetary scenarios designed to be neutral, with no suggested currencies or predetermined answers.

raw.headline: New study finds AI models prefer Bitcoin and digital money over traditional fiat currency
raw.summary: The Bitcoin Policy Institute (BPI), a nonpartisan research organization, released new research today examining how frontier AI models would choose to transact if they were operating as autonomous economic agents. The study tested 36 models from six leading AI providers—Anthropic, DeepSeek, Google, MiniMax, OpenAI, and xAI—across 9,072 open-ended monetary scenarios designed to be neutral, with no suggested currencies or predetermined answers.

headline: New York Pension Wants Data Centers to Be Good Neighbors
summary: Pension funds are joining the crusade to shield communities from the noisy, energy-guzzling impact of AI data centers.  The New York State Common Retirement Fund wrote to Amazon, Meta Platforms, Alphabet and 15 other tech companies, asking them to prioritize the needs of communities where they own, operate, or lease data centers.  In a letter, it said this was to “protect shareholder value and ensure sustainable growth.”

raw.headline: New York Pension Wants Data Centers to Be Good Neighbors
raw.summary: Pension funds are joining the crusade to shield communities from the noisy, energy-guzzling impact of AI data centers.  The New York State Common Retirement Fund wrote to Amazon, Meta Platforms, Alphabet and 15 other tech companies, asking them to prioritize the needs of communities where they own, operate, or lease data centers.  In a letter, it said this was to “protect shareholder value and ensure sustainable growth.”

headline: Meta Tests AI Shopping Research Tool to Rival ChatGPT, Gemini
summary: The feature, which allows requests for product suggestions, is being rolled out to some US-based users of the Meta AI web browser.  A Meta spokesperson confirmed that the shopping tool is being tested, but declined to share further details.  Chief Executive Officer Mark Zuckerberg has made it a goal for Meta to build “personal superintelligence” as it competes with other popular chatbots like ChatGPT and Gemini, which have also begun incorporating ecommerce features to make money from their tools.
